'''鈭歠-g-p''' ('''fagapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yerd|yerd]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yerd|yerd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-g-p
|-
! Lemma
| fagapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fagapithi|fagapithi]] || [[word:fagapiji|fagapiji]] || [[word:fagapishi|fagapishi]] || [[word:fagapi|fagapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagaputhuth|fagaputhuth]] || [[word:fagapujuj|fagapujuj]] || [[word:fagapushush|fagapushush]] || [[word:fagap|fagap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagaputhu|fagaputhu]] || [[word:fagapuju|fagapuju]] || [[word:fagapushu|fagapushu]] || [[word:fagapu|fagapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagapufuth|fagapufuth]] || [[word:fagapufuj|fagapufuj]] || [[word:fagapufush|fagapufush]] || [[word:fagapuf|fagapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fagapethe|fagapethe]] || [[word:fagapeje|fagapeje]] || [[word:fagapeshe|fagapeshe]] || [[word:fagape|fagape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagapothoth|fagapothoth]] || [[word:fagapojoj|fagapojoj]] || [[word:fagaposhosh|fagaposhosh]] || [[word:fagap|fagap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagapotho|fagapotho]] || [[word:fagapojo|fagapojo]] || [[word:fagaposho|fagaposho]] || [[word:fagapo|fagapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagapofoth|fagapofoth]] || [[word:fagapofoj|fagapofoj]] || [[word:fagapofosh|fagapofosh]] || [[word:fagapof|fagapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fagap忙th忙|fagap忙th忙]] || [[word:fagap忙j忙|fagap忙j忙]] || [[word:fagap忙sh忙|fagap忙sh忙]] || [[word:fagap忙|fagap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagapathath|fagapathath]] || [[word:fagapajaj|fagapajaj]] || [[word:fagapashash|fagapashash]] || [[word:fagap|fagap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagapatha|fagapatha]] || [[word:fagapaja|fagapaja]] || [[word:fagapasha|fagapasha]] || [[word:fagapa|fagapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagapafath|fagapafath]] || [[word:fagapafaj|fagapafaj]] || [[word:fagapafash|fagapafash]] || [[word:fagapaf|fagapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fagapasha|fagapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofagapasha|gofagapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifagapasha|gokifagapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fagapn眉sha|fagapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofagapnkn眉sha|gofagapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifagapn眉sha|gokifagapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fagapsh毛sha|fagapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofagapnksh毛sha|gofagapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifagapsh毛sha|gokifagapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fagaprosha|fagaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofagapnkrosha|gofagapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifagaprosha|gokifagaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fagapmusha|fagapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofagapnkmusha|gofagapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifagapmusha|gokifagapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fagapsherasha|fagapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofagapnksherasha|gofagapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifagapsherasha|gokifagapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fagapngasha|fagapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofagapnkngasha|gofagapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifagapngasha|gokifagapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fagapyasha|fagapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofagapnkyasha|gofagapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifagapyasha|gokifagapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fagapyamasha|fagapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofagapnkyamasha|gofagapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifagapyamasha|gokifagapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fagapn眉sh毛sha|fagapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofagapnkn眉sh毛sha|gofagapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifagapn眉sh毛sha|gokifagapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fagapn眉rosha|fagapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofagapnkn眉rosha|gofagapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifagapn眉rosha|gokifagapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fagapn眉musha|fagapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofagapnkn眉musha|gofagapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifagapn眉musha|gokifagapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fagapsh毛n眉sha|fagapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofagapnksh毛n眉sha|gofagapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifagapsh毛n眉sha|gokifagapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fagapsh毛rosha|fagapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofagapnksh毛rosha|gofagapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifagapsh毛rosha|gokifagapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fagapsh毛musha|fagapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofagapnksh毛musha|gofagapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifagapsh毛musha|gokifagapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fagapron眉sha|fagapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofagapnkron眉sha|gofagapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifagapron眉sha|gokifagapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fagaprosh毛sha|fagaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofagapnkrosh毛sha|gofagapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifagaprosh毛sha|gokifagaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fagapromusha|fagapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofagapnkromusha|gofagapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifagapromusha|gokifagapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fagapmun眉sha|fagapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofagapnkmun眉sha|gofagapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifagapmun眉sha|gokifagapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fagapmush毛sha|fagapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofagapnkmush毛sha|gofagapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifagapmush毛sha|gokifagapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fagapmurosha|fagapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofagapnkmurosha|gofagapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifagapmurosha|gokifagapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fagap|fagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:f忙g忙p|f忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofagap|hofagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hof忙g忙p|hof忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofagap|hohofagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohof忙g忙p|hohof忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉fagap|n眉fagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉f忙g忙p|n眉f忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉fagap|n眉n眉fagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉f忙g忙p|n眉n眉f忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂fagap|n茂fagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂f忙g忙p|n茂f忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂fagap|n茂n茂fagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂f忙g忙p|n茂n茂f忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufagap|lufagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luf忙g忙p|luf忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufagap|lulufagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluf忙g忙p|luluf忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifagap|lifagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lif忙g忙p|lif忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifagap|lilifagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilif忙g忙p|lilif忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofagap|kofagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kof忙g忙p|kof忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofagap|kokofagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokof忙g忙p|kokof忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefagap|kefagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kef忙g忙p|kef忙g忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefagap|kekefagap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekef忙g忙p|kekef忙g忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
